# ShermLabs

ShermLabs builds practical AI-powered software for transcription, research, documentation, and productivity.

## Products

- ShermLabs Memory: An audio transcription and note organization application.
- AI research and knowledge tools.
- Offline and privacy-focused AI workflows.

## Website

- Home: https://shermlabs.com/
- Application: https://app.shermlabs.com/
- Contact: mailto:sherm@shermlabs.com
